Items.Name: Select / Mark Region
Items.Tooltip: Selection bridge for painted, lassoed, or semantic edit masks.

Items.Name: Thicken Brush
Items.Tooltip: Pushes the surface outward under the cursor using MeshLib surface manipulation.

Items.Name: Scoop Brush
Items.Tooltip: Pushes the surface inward under the cursor for local recess and cavity work.

Items.Name: Smooth Brush
Items.Tooltip: Relaxes rough AI-generated chatter under the brush while preserving the surrounding surface.

Items.Name: Measure / Inspect
Items.Tooltip: Hook for hover coordinates, point-to-point measurement, and local thickness probes.
